content: The working memory capacity limit that constrains agent reasoning is not a hard structural bug to be eliminated by larger memory architectures, but an implicit curiosity regularization mechanism that can be leveraged to build more sample-efficient active learning agents. SOTA 2024-2025 active learning agent memory designs that only expand working memory capacity inadvertently reduce out-of-distribution exploration by letting agents fall back on cached, uninformative past trajectories instead of seeking novel information.
source_topics: agent working memory capacity limits reasoning
trigger_topic: agent working memory capacity limits reasoning
